author: y4rr
content: Surfaced by phase 2.2 conformance dispatch (#764). cummax_f64 / cummin_f64 GPU kernels return values around 1e-310 (denormal) for moderate-magnitude inputs in [-5,5], when the correct cumulative running extremum should match the input magnitude. Suggests an uninitialized / wrong-stride buffer read in the kernel. Repro: cargo test -p ferrotorch-core --test conformance_reduction --features gpu gpu_cummax_forward gpu_cummin_forward. CPU and GPU f32 cummax/cummin paths both pass. Test #764 keeps GPU f64 cases marked with #[ignore = "blocked on #787"].
